channel.title: JLT Spotlight (Facebook)
channel.description: Weekly Cruise, Hotel & Destination of the Week from JLT Group

item.title: One for the long-haul winter-sun specialists… TUI has announced the only nonstop UK flights to Zanzibar, departing from Gatwick from 3 November 2027. Twice weekly, Wednesdays and Sundays, through to 22 March 2028. 🌊
item.description:
One for the long-haul winter-sun specialists… TUI has announced the only nonstop UK flights to Zanzibar, departing from Gatwick from 3 November 2027. Twice weekly, Wednesdays and Sundays, through to 22 March 2028. 🌊
The connection has been the sticking point for years. That is now gone. Direct from Gatwick changes the conversation entirely, especially for clients who have been curious about the Spice Island but baulked at the journey.
Lead-in prices start from £1,615 per person (two adults, all-inclusive, seven nights including flights and transfers). The Winter 2027 programme goes on sale 2 July 2026. Worth having your shortlist ready before that date. ✈️
Full spotlight on the website… link in the comments 💬

item.title: One for the back pocket, this week's Hotel Spotlight… 🏨
item.description:
One for the back pocket, this week's Hotel Spotlight… 🏨
Bodrum Loft is the hotel for the client who wants Bodrum's glamour without the noise. Picture a little white village of minimalist villas stepping down a pine hillside to a private Aegean cove, barefoot beach-club mood, and a sea view from nearly every room.
It is the calmer side of the peninsula… thirtysomething couples, Istanbul families, a sleepy bay, and a genuinely good table with Paper Moon right over the water. Villa kitchens make it a strong one for longer stays and honeymoons too. ✈️
Full spotlight on the website… link in the comments 💬

item.title: One for the luxury specialists in our community… 🚢
item.description:
One for the luxury specialists in our community… 🚢
Silversea has opened a savings window worth knowing about this week. Up to 45 per cent off select voyages across all seven continents, and it closes on 30 June. That hard date is the point. It gives you a clear, premium reason to pick up the phone to your established luxury clients this week rather than waiting for them to come to you.
A few autumn 2026 sailings worth flagging: Greek Isles and Istanbul from £3,550 pp on Silver Ray, and two overlapping Greek Isles departures on Silver Nova and Silver Spirit from £3,750–£3,850 pp. Good comparison material if a client is weighing itinerary over ship. ✈️
Full spotlight on the website… link in the comments 💬
